title: Meaning of FREEZING_IN_FEAR
seoDescription: What does it mean to dream of FREEZING_IN_FEAR?
introduction: To dream of FREEZING_IN_FEAR represents korkudan donakalmak, rüya aleminde derin bir kö....
symbolism: This symbol is associated with korku, donakalmak, bilinçaltı, travma, spiritüel uyanış.
